heading: Step 4: Reject operations of a specific query shape.
body:
Use [setQuerySettings](manual/reference/command/setQuerySettings) in your
[db.adminCommand()](manual/reference/method/db.adminCommand) method to pass in the `queryShapeHash`,
which specifies the [query shape](manual/core/query-shapes) you want to reject.

> **Note:** You must have the [atlasAdmin](manual/reference/built-in-roles) role to use
> [setQuerySettings](manual/reference/command/setQuerySettings).

For an example, see [Block Slow Queries with Operation Rejection Filters](manual/tutorial/operation-rejection-filters).
